title: Utopia Cobbleverse
description: A lightweight client modpack built for the Utopia Cobbleverse server, enhancing the Cobblemon experience with performance improvements, exploration tools, and quality-of-life features. With mods like Sodium, Roughly Enough Items, and Xaero's Minimap
body:
The Utopia Cobbleverse Client Modpack is a curated collection of mods designed to enhance gameplay on the Utopia Cobbleverse Cobblemon server. Built around Cobblemon, this pack expands the Pokémon-style experience with additional Cobblemon addons that introduce features such as breeding, mounts, badges, and improved battle systems.

To ensure smooth gameplay, the pack includes major performance optimizations like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore, helping reduce lag and improve FPS during multiplayer sessions. Players also gain useful exploration and interface tools such as Xaero's Minimap and Roughly Enough Items, making navigation and crafting easier while exploring the Cobbleverse.

The pack also includes decorative building mods, improved visuals, storage solutions, and various quality-of-life improvements that make long-term multiplayer play more enjoyable. Overall, this modpack provides a smoother, more immersive Cobblemon experience tailored specifically for the Utopia Cobbleverse community.
